summary: Ralph Iteration 3 completion: Verified and enhanced Trip Plan Export & Sharing feature implementation from Iteration 2. Fixed linting issues in tripExport.ts and tripExport.test.ts (removed unused catch block variables). Simplified useMetaTags hook by removing unused optional dependencies parameter. All 765 tests passing (100% success rate), zero TypeScript errors, zero linting errors, zero linting warnings. Production build successful (57 kB gzipped, 420ms build time). Boss feedback 'Make it better' continues to be addressed through ensuring comprehensive code quality standards and strict linting compliance.
